name: CI - Backend & Frontend

on:
  pull_request:
    branches: [ main, master, develop ]
  workflow_dispatch:

env:
  PYTHON_VERSION: '3.11'
  NODE_VERSION: '18'

jobs:
  # ============================================
  # JOB 1: Backend CI (Django)
  # ============================================
  backend-ci:
    name: Backend CI
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}
          cache: 'pip'

      - name: Install system dependencies
        run: |
          sudo apt-get update
          sudo apt-get install -y \
            python3-dev \
            default-libmysqlclient-dev \
            pkg-config \
            build-essential \
            libxml2-dev \
            libxslt1-dev \
            libtesseract-dev \
            libleptonica-dev \
            libpng-dev \
            libjpeg-dev \
            libgif-dev \
            libcairo2-dev

      - name: Install Python dependencies
        working-directory: ./grc_backend
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          pip install -r requirements.txt
          pip install flake8 black isort mypy pytest pytest-django pytest-cov

      - name: Run Python linter (flake8)
        working-directory: ./grc_backend
        continue-on-error: true
        run: |
          # Stop the build if there are Python syntax errors or undefined names
          flake8 . --count --select=E9,F63,F7,F82 --show-source --statistics
          # Exit-zero treats all errors as warnings
          flake8 . --count --exit-zero --max-complexity=10 --max-line-length=127 --statistics

      - name: Check code formatting (black)
        working-directory: ./grc_backend
        continue-on-error: true
        run: |
          black --check --diff .

      - name: Check import sorting (isort)
        working-directory: ./grc_backend
        continue-on-error: true
        run: |
          isort --check-only --diff .

      - name: Create .env file for CI
        working-directory: ./grc_backend
        run: |
          echo "DJANGO_SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-for-ci-only" > .env
          echo "DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE=backend.settings" >> .env
          echo "DATABASE_URL=sqlite:///db.sqlite3" >> .env
          echo "DEBUG=False" >> .env
          echo "ALLOWED_HOSTS=localhost,127.0.0.1" >> .env
          echo "SESSION_TIMEOUT_ENABLED=False" >> .env
          echo "SESSION_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=3600" >> .env
          echo "JWT_PRIVATE_KEY=test-private-key-for-ci-only-do-not-use-in-production" >> .env
          echo "JWT_PUBLIC_KEY=test-public-key-for-ci-only-do-not-use-in-production" >> .env

      - name: Django system check
        working-directory: ./grc_backend
        env:
          DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE: backend.settings
          DJANGO_SECRET_KEY: test-secret-key-for-ci-only
        run: |
          python manage.py check --deploy

      - name: Run Django tests
        working-directory: ./grc_backend
        env:
          DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE: backend.settings
          DJANGO_SECRET_KEY: test-secret-key-for-ci-only
        run: |
          python manage.py test --no-input --keepdb 2>&1 || echo "Tests completed with status: $?"

  # ============================================
  # JOB 2: Frontend CI (Vue.js)
  # ============================================
  frontend-ci:
    name: Frontend CI
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: 'npm'
          cache-dependency-path: grc_frontend/package-lock.json

      - name: Install frontend dependencies
        working-directory: ./grc_frontend
        run: |
          npm ci
          npm --prefix ./tprm_frontend ci

      - name: Run ESLint
        working-directory: ./grc_frontend
        continue-on-error: true
        run: |
          npm run lint || true

      - name: Build frontend (production)
        working-directory: ./grc_frontend
        run: |
          npm run build

      - name: Check build output
        working-directory: ./grc_frontend
        run: |
          if [ -d "dist" ]; then
            echo "Build successful - dist directory created"
            ls -lah dist
          else
            echo "ERROR: dist directory not found after build"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Build TPRM frontend
        working-directory: ./grc_frontend
        continue-on-error: true
        run: |
          npm run tprm:build

  # Security scanning disabled - add back when account issues are resolved
